supply_chain.dependencies: Extensive reliance on third-party service providers for key components of business infrastructure including technology systems, data processing, and operational services
risks: Third-party service provider failures or performance issues
Inability to timely replace critical service providers
Concentration risk from consolidation of financial technology providers

regulatory_risks: Enhanced prudential standards and regulatory tailoring rules for Category III banking organizations
Capital requirements including Stress Capital Buffer and potential countercyclical capital buffer
Liquidity Coverage Ratio and Net Stable Funding Ratio requirements
Resolution planning requirements (165(d) and IDI Resolution Plans)
Comprehensive Capital Analysis and Review (CCAR) process
Bank Secrecy Act and Anti-Money Laundering compliance
OFAC sanctions compliance
Consumer Financial Protection Bureau oversight and enforcement
Dodd-Frank Act compliance
Volcker Rule restrictions on proprietary trading and fund ownership
Community Reinvestment Act requirements
Data privacy and protection regulations (Gramm-Leach-Bliley Act, state privacy laws)
Cybersecurity regulations and incident reporting requirements
CFPB rule on consumer data access and open banking
Proposed long-term debt and clean holding company requirements
Basel III capital framework revisions
FDIC special assessment for bank failures
Overdraft fee regulations
Fair lending and consumer protection laws
SEC and CFTC derivatives regulations
FINRA broker-dealer regulations
State banking regulations across multiple jurisdictions
Climate risk management and disclosure requirements

sanction_risks: Risk of sanctions violations resulting in fines and penalties
Exposure to clients or counterparties subject to sanctions
